entries.source: "Help me prepare for finals"
entries.value: "मलाई अन्तिम परीक्षाको तयारी गर्न मद्दत गर्नुहोस्"

entries.source: "Make a JEE revision schedule"
entries.value: "JEE पुनरावृत्ति तालिका बनाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: "Plan 2 weeks for biology"
entries.value: "जीवविज्ञानका लागि २ हप्ताको योजना बनाउनुहोस्"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Exam Prep Planner on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Planning learning का लागि inspir मा Exam Prep Planner प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner For Realistic Study Schedules is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Build a realistic exam plan from your date, syllabus, strengths, and weak areas.
entries.value: यथार्थ study schedule का लागि AI Exam Prep Planner निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: आफ्नो date, syllabus, strengths र weak areas बाट यथार्थ exam plan बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Planner Study Schedule Guide
entries.value: AI Exam Prep Planner Study Schedule Guide

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Exam Prep Planner
entries.value: परीक्षा तयारी योजनाकार

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Plan review.
entries.value: review plan गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: योजना

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: topics prioritize गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Exam Prep Planner. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Flashcard Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Exam Prep Planner मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Flashcard Builder try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Students who need a plan that balances revision, practice, confidence, and real life.
entries.value: विद्यार्थीहरू जसलाई पुनरावृत्ति, अभ्यास, आत्मविश्वास र वास्तविक जीवनलाई सन्तुलनमा राख्ने योजना चाहिन्छ।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: योजनाकारले कमजोर पक्षहरूलाई प्राथमिकता दिन्छ, समीक्षा लूपहरू थप्छ र छुटेका दिनहरूका लागि वैकल्पिक योजनाहरू बनाउँछ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Track risk areas.
entries.value: जोखिम क्षेत्रहरू ट्र्याक गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Exam Prep Planner प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
